PhenoMapR 0.1.0
  • Get started
    • Single-cell example
    • Spatial transcriptomics
    • Bulk survival analysis
    • Custom reference
  • R functions

Package index

Prognostic scoring

Score expression data with weighted sum of prognostic gene signatures.

PhenoMap()
Score Expression Data with Prognostic Gene Signatures
normalize_scores()
Calculate Z-Scores
add_scores_to_seurat()
Add Scores to Seurat Object
add_scores_to_sce()
Add Scores to SingleCellExperiment Object

Reference data and utilities

List cancer types, check gene coverage, get top prognostic genes, and helpers.

list_cancer_types()
List Available Cancer Types
get_gene_coverage()
Get Gene Coverage
get_top_prognostic_genes()
Get Top Prognostic Genes
get_celltype_palette()
Get Cell Type Color Palette
cell_type_colors
Default Cell Type Color Palette
load_rds_fast()
Load RDS File with Fast Parallel Decompression

Reference datasets (internal)

Built-in reference data; use list_cancer_types() and PhenoMap() in practice.

precog
PRECOG Prognostic Z-Scores
tcga
TCGA Prognostic Z-Scores
pediatric
Pediatric Cancer Prognostic Z-Scores
ici
Immune Checkpoint Inhibitor (ICI) Prognostic Z-Scores

Custom reference derivation

Derive reference z-scores from bulk expression and phenotype.

derive_reference_from_bulk()
Derive Reference Z-Scores from Bulk Expression and Phenotype
plot_reference_signature()
Plot reference signature z-scores as a 1×N heatmap

Phenotype group analysis

Define adverse/favorable groups and find marker genes.

define_phenotype_groups()
Define Phenotype Groups (Top and Bottom Percentile)
find_phenotype_markers()
Find Unique Marker Genes for Adverse and Favorable Phenotype Groups
plot_phenotype_markers()
Plot phenotype marker gene heatmaps (ComplexHeatmap)

Visualization

plot_score_distribution()
Plot Score Distribution
